description_long: This is a large, upright vending machine with a predominantly red exterior and a flat black base. The front face features a transparent display window showcasing a variety of bottled and canned beverages, each with its own illuminated selection button below. Above the product display, a white, wavy sign reads 'Welcome to Ueno!' and is decorated with red and gold accents, while a prominent advertisement for 'Georgia Deep Black' coffee is mounted on the upper right. The right side of the front panel houses a payment interface with coin and bill acceptors, a card reader, and a digital display, as well as several promotional stickers and instructions. The product retrieval slot is located at the lower center of the front, beneath the product display, and is marked by a black flap. The sides and back of the machine are solid red metal panels, with no visible openings or features.
description: A large red vending machine with a transparent front display for beverages, illuminated selection buttons, and prominent signage. Payment and retrieval interfaces are located on the front right side.
description_view_0: The left side of the vending machine, showing a plain, solid red metal panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: The front view displays the transparent product window, illuminated selection buttons, payment interface, retrieval slot, and prominent signage including 'Welcome to Ueno!' and 'Georgia Deep Black'.
description_view_2: The right side of the vending machine, similar to the left, is a plain red metal panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: The back of the vending machine, featuring a solid red metal panel with no openings, signage, or visible components.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular illuminated display panel is located on the upper right front, showing digital information and instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, all located on the right side of the front panel, with clear labeling and metallic finishes.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual illuminated selection buttons are arranged in rows below each product in the display window, each labeled with product information.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot with a black flap is located at the lower center of the front panel.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding includes a large white sign with 'Welcome to Ueno!' at the top, a 'Georgia Deep Black' advertisement on the upper right, and various promotional stickers and instructions on the front.
